headline: Why General Motors (GM) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of automotive manufacturer General Motors (NYSE:GM) jumped 4.7% in the afternoon session after the announcement that the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open," provided massive relief.

headline: Deutsche Bank Turns Bullish on GM as Goldman Sachs Lowers Valuation Outlook
summary: General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) is included among the Top 10 Reddit Stocks That Will Skyrocket. On April 14, Deutsche Bank analyst Edison Yu upgraded General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) to Buy from Hold. It also raised the price target to $90 from $83 on the stock, following the recent pullback in the shares. The analyst said […]
